---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a concrete improvement to course structure or content quality.
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem
What problem are learners facing?

## Proposed Change
What should be added or changed?

## Why This Helps
How will this improve learning quality or contributor velocity?

## Scope
- Files/folders impacted:
- Estimated complexity: low / medium / high

## Acceptance Criteria
List measurable completion criteria.

## Alternatives Considered
What else did you consider?
